title: Jet Ski in Nice: Costs, Seasons and Top Tips for 2026
html:
Renting a jet ski in Nice puts you on the shimmering Baie des Anges with the Alpes-Maritimes as your backdrop; a one-hour solo hire from Port Lympia starts at around €140. BoatHire24 lists dozens of personal watercraft and skippered vessels from local operators, making it easy to compare options for your day on the water.

Where to set off in Nice

The main launch point is Port Lympia, the city’s historic deep-water harbour, which offers secure parking and direct access to open water. Further east, the plage de la Reserve at the Cap de Nice provides a more sheltered put-in. For those staying west, the marina at Saint-Laurent-du-Var gives quick access to the Var river mouth and the wider bay. A short ride south brings you to Villefranche-sur-Mer, whose deep natural harbour is a calm spot to pick up skippered charters in Nice or simply pause to take in the shoreline. The strip between Nice and Antibes is particularly scenic, with the island of Sainte-Marguerite visible from mid-bay. You can skippered charters in Nice for your chosen dates.

Which boat to rent

BoatHire24 groups its fleet into clear categories; here are the main options you can book directly. One option worth a look is the Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski charter page.

  1. Stand-up jet ski, best for solo speed freaks; one rider; from €90 per half-hour.
  2. Two-seat jet ski, ideal for couples exploring the coast; two guests; from €140 per hour.
  3. Three-seat jet ski (e.g. Sea-Doo GTX), versatile for families; three guests; from €180 per hour; see the Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski charter page for detailed specs and booking.
  4. Small motorboat (20, 26 ft), suited to picnicking in Villefranche Bay; four guests; from €250 for a half-day.
  5. Rigid inflatable (RIB), fast and stable for groups; six guests; from €320 for two hours.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Nice?

A one-hour jet ski hire typically costs between €140 and €220, depending on power and season. Shared tours of the Baie des Anges start at around €90 per person for 90 minutes. Half-day small motorboat hire from Port Lympia runs €250, €350 without fuel. A full-day catamaran charter (10, 12 guests) lies in the €1,200, €1,600 range. Crewed yachts, such as an Azimut 58, can fetch €4,000, €6,000 per day for up to twelve people, including a skipper and fuel. If you own a boat, you can become a host and earn from spare days.

  • Shared jet ski tour (90 minutes): €90 per person
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 persons): €250
  • Catamaran full-day (12 persons): €1,400 average
  • Crewed motor yacht full-day (12 persons): €5,000 average

Do you need a licence to ride a jet ski in Nice?

No, you do not need a licence for a jet ski if you take a skippered tour or the operator provides a brief sighting. French law permits unlicensed rental of personal watercraft up to a certain power, provided the operator gives a safety briefing and the renter is at least 18. Each charter company sets its own minimum age and policy, so check the listing details on BoatHire24. The high season runs from June to September, when the Mistral wind can occasionally kick up a short chop; early mornings are usually glassy. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Nice or list your own.

If the Mistral is forecast, book a morning slot around the Cap de Nice, the lee side remains flat while the open bay gets lumpy.

At a glance

  • Price band: €90, €6,000 per trip
  • Peak months: June, September
  • Trip length: 1 hour to full day
  • Guest capacity: 1, 12 persons
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Nice

Can I take a jet ski from Nice to Monaco?

Yes, it is roughly 12 nautical miles, taking about 30, 40 minutes at cruising speed, but you must respect the 5‑knot zone within 300 metres of the shore.

What insurance is included with a jet ski rental?

Most BoatHire24 listings include third-party liability insurance, and you can often purchase a damage waiver at the check-in desk for a small fee.

Is there an age limit for passengers?

Passengers must generally be at least six years old and wear a life jacket; drivers must be 18 or older with a valid ID.

Can I fish from a rented jet ski?

Fishing is permitted from a jet ski in Nice provided you hold a valid French fishing licence and follow local marine park rules.

Whether you are a seasoned rider or a first-timer, Nice offers some of the best jet skiing in the Mediterranean. Booking through BoatHire24 ensures transparent pricing and verified operators. If you own a watercraft and want to reach thousands of travellers, you can become a host and list your jet ski or boat on the marketplace. BoatHire24 already connects renters with quality vessels from Port Lympia to Antibes.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Nice and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
